Email Marketing Agent.action: Scrapes the R1 Concepts website for current brake part products, promotions, pricing, and featured inventory to use as email content.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Merges live inventory data into the existing backorder report, flags parts with no available source as dead-ends, and prioritizes items by urgency and resolution path.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Transforms a static backorder list into an actionable, enriched report that immediately tells the team which orders can be fulfilled, which are in progress, and which need escalation.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Generates and sends draft customer communications for each backorder status category — updates for in-transit items, alternatives for dead-end parts, and revised ETAs for on-order parts.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Eliminates hours of manual email drafting by producing ready-to-send customer updates, keeping customers informed proactively and reducing inbound status inquiry calls.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Scrapes the online catalogs of Gyro Disc, Alcon, and Brembo to extract two-piece rotor listings with full make, model, year fitment data and specifications.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Automates the tedious process of manually browsing three separate competitor catalogs, capturing comprehensive market coverage data in minutes instead of days.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Cross-references the scraped competitor rotor data against DFC's existing parts catalog to identify overlapping coverage and market gaps where DFC has no equivalent product.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Reveals exactly which vehicle applications DFC already covers and where new product opportunities exist, giving Dino a clear picture of competitive positioning without manual comparison.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Sends automated outreach emails to targeted customers asking about demand and interest for specific two-piece rotor applications identified in the gap analysis.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Gathers real demand data directly from customers to validate which gaps are worth filling, replacing guesswork with actual market signals before committing to new inventory.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Compiles all scraped data, cross-reference results, and customer demand responses into one formatted reference sheet delivered to Dino for product planning decisions.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Gives Dino a single, comprehensive document combining competitor intelligence, DFC coverage, and customer demand — everything needed to make informed stocking decisions in one place.

Meta Investigation.action: Scans all active ad campaigns across Meta and TikTok, extracting every piece of ad copy including headlines, body text, descriptions, and call-to-action fields.
Meta Investigation.impact: Provides instant visibility across all running ad copy without requiring manual review of each campaign, ensuring no active ad is missed during compliance or brand checks.

Meta Investigation.action: Searches all extracted ad copy for specific flagged phrases, identifies exact matches, and records the precise field and full copy context where each match was found.
Meta Investigation.impact: Pinpoints problematic or non-compliant language across hundreds of ads in seconds, catching issues that manual reviewers would likely miss or take hours to find.

Meta Investigation.action: Emails a formatted flagged list showing every match found, organized by campaign with the exact ad field and surrounding copy for each flagged phrase.
Meta Investigation.impact: Delivers an actionable compliance report directly to the team's inbox, enabling immediate corrective action on problematic ads before they cause brand or legal exposure.

summary: Here's this week's update on our AI automation pipeline. We're tracking **53 total agents** — **24 completed**, **9 in progress**, and **20 planned**. This week we added four new agents to the pipeline: the **Cerritos Building Sublet Agent**, a daily lead-gen tool finding local businesses for our Midway Place sublet; **R1 DFC Amazon Ads AI**, which will analyze and optimize Amazon ad campaigns across both brands; **R1 Video Clipper**; and **Paid Channel Chat Bot**. On the progress front, **Agent Tracker Agent V2** moved to Completed, giving us a polished new version of our weekly agent tracking output. Momentum continues to build — looking forward to pushing more agents across the finish line in the weeks ahead!
